runtime_conversion_notes: Native sherpa-onnx streaming transducer (zipformer2) consumed directly via OnlineRecognizer transducer model field (encoder/decoder/joiner int8 chunk-16-left-128) on the v1.13.2 Android runtime. No format conversion required.
notes: EN A2 demo model. Streaming transducer, int8 chunk-16-left-128 variant (encoder.int8 + decoder.int8 + joiner.int8 + tokens.txt). Downloaded to device, NOT bundled in the APK. sha256/artifact_size_mb describe the representative encoder artifact; package-evidence.json enumerates all four files. A2 demo evidence is not a launch-support claim; support matrix still requires WS6 benchmark evidence.
